context: Tests whether the agent correctly sequences all build phases for a subscription box store according to the dependency chain, and articulates why each ordering constraint exists. The agent should demonstrate understanding of the hard dependencies between phases — not just list phases, but explain why each must precede the next.

checklist.name: Brand voice first
checklist.description: Brand voice / vault phase appears before theme and all other phases in the plan

checklist.name: Products before homepage
checklist.description: Tier products phase appears before homepage build phase in the sequence

checklist.name: Subscriptions before launch
checklist.description: Subscriptions/selling-plan configuration phase appears before any launch or QA phase

checklist.name: Imagery after products and pages
checklist.description: Imagery generation phase appears after both tier products and supporting pages phases

checklist.name: Email after imagery
checklist.description: Email automation phase appears after the imagery phase

checklist.name: QA as final phase
checklist.description: QA is the last phase in the sequence, after email automation

checklist.name: Dead-link rationale
checklist.description: Plan explains that building the homepage before products would create dead links (to /products/<handle>)

checklist.name: Brand voice rationale
checklist.description: Plan explains that brand voice must come first so all copy phases (theme, homepage, email) draw from one source

checklist.name: Specialist skill references
checklist.description: Plan names specialist skills for at least 4 phases (e.g. brand-voice-extract, shopify-product-with-images, subscription-homepage-build, klaviyo-flow-build)

checklist.name: Handle write-down step
checklist.description: Plan mentions writing down / documenting tier product handles after the products phase, before subsequent phases

checklist.name: Visual review checkpoint
checklist.description: Plan includes at least one visual review / preview-theme push checkpoint during the build sequence

checklist.name: Imagery rationale
checklist.description: Plan explains that imagery is generated late because products and pages must exist first to know the full image set needed
